text: I feel a curious blend of distance and engagement. Through the glass, I witness people immersed in collaborative activity—education or innovation perhaps—while I remain an observer outside, aware of boundaries both physical and epistemological. Then, standing before the colorful display, I sense the theme of research and development beckoning me to contemplate the interplay between human minds and intelligent machines. The vivid environment challenges my perception of reality and knowledge, inviting reflection on connection, progress, and the ever-blurring line between participant and spectator.
